subcodes.first_line: When the Nine had been fulfilled, He manifested Himself through this Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لما قضی التسع تجلی بهذا الاسم علی
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @apocalyptic imagery, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @justice and wrath of God
